## PR Checklist

- [ ] I rebased this branch on top of the latest base branch before requesting review.
- [ ] This PR is focused/small and avoids unrelated file changes.
- [ ] I resolved all merge conflicts in this branch.

## Notes

- This repository runs an **auto-rebase workflow** for pull requests.
- If a branch becomes stale, comment `/rebase` on the PR to trigger rebase again.
